summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new RAG/semantic retrieval pipeline upgrade. 40/42 backend tests passed (95%). Frontend RAG features working correctly - RetrievalPanel displays chunk cards with scores, layers, and previews. Semantic scoring works as expected: portal.log chunks (0.738, 0.660) score higher than noise.log (0.526) for SAML queries.

minor.issue: AI analysis takes 60-90s to complete. Test polling may timeout if not given enough time. This is expected behavior for LLM calls.

issues: Retrieval settings (retrieval_top_k, chunk_size_chars, chunk_overlap_chars, max_index_bytes_per_file) are not exposed in the UI. They work via API but users cannot configure them through the Settings page.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add retrieval settings (top_k, chunk_size, overlap, max_index_bytes) to Settings page UI for advanced users
critical_code_review_comments: retrieval.py embed() function correctly converts np.float32 to plain Python float for ChromaDB compatibility
Background indexing via BackgroundTasks works correctly - files are indexed within 1-4 seconds
Vector cleanup on file/case delete is properly implemented
AI analysis correctly uses retrieved chunks and includes retrieval metadata in response

success_rate.backend: 95% (40/42 tests passed - 2 transient failures due to timing)

seed_data_creation: Test cases created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: RAG pipeline fully functional. Key endpoints: GET /api/cases/{id}/retrieval/stats, POST /api/cases/{id}/retrieval/search, POST /api/cases/{id}/files/{fid}/reindex. AI analysis now includes ai_results.retrieval with top_k, query, chunks[], total_chunks_in_case. Frontend RetrievalPanel (data-testid='retrieval-panel') displays retrieved chunks with data-testid='retrieved-chunk-N'. Semantic scoring verified: relevant content scores higher than noise.

new_features_tested.background_indexing: PASS - Files indexed into ChromaDB within 1-6 seconds of upload
new_features_tested.retrieval_search: PASS - POST /api/cases/{id}/retrieval/search returns ranked hits with score/file_name/chunk_index/layer
new_features_tested.vector_cleanup_file_delete: PASS - DELETE file clears its vectors from ChromaDB
new_features_tested.vector_cleanup_case_delete: PASS - DELETE case clears all vectors for that case
new_features_tested.ai_analysis_with_retrieval: PASS - Analysis uses retrieved chunks and returns retrieval metadata
new_features_tested.retrieval_settings_api: PASS - GET/PUT /api/settings includes retrieval_top_k, chunk_size_chars, chunk_overlap_chars, max_index_bytes_per_file
new_features_tested.frontend_retrieval_panel: PASS - RetrievalPanel displays chunk cards with scores, layers, previews
new_features_tested.semantic_scoring: PASS - portal.log (SAML errors) scores 0.738 vs noise.log 0.526 for SAML query
